question.question: If counsel continues to equivocate, the tribunal {a1} deliberate obstruction.

source.name: Custom: Will vs Be Going To All Levels (C2)

tag.name: Will vs Be Going To All Levels

variants.text: If counsel continues to equivocate, the tribunal {a1} deliberate obstruction.

hints.hint:
Form: **will + base verb**.
In warnings about a likely consequence, this pattern uses **will**.
Example: *If counsel continues to equivocate, the tribunal will infer deliberate obstruction.*

Forma: **will + czasownik w formie podstawowej**.
W ostrzeżeniach o prawdopodobnej konsekwencji w tym modelu używamy **will**.
Przykład: *If counsel continues to equivocate, the tribunal will infer deliberate obstruction.*

Форма: **will + V1**.
У попередженнях про ймовірний наслідок у цій моделі використовується **will**.
Приклад: *If counsel continues to equivocate, the tribunal will infer deliberate obstruction.*
